response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack engineer and has worked with multiple languages and frameworks, including C++ early in his career. However, his recent roles have focused heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and other modern web technologies, with limited evidence of recent C++ development, high-performance systems, or industrial automation exposure. His strong general software engineering skills and open-source contributions are valuable, but alignment with the specific industrial automation and cybersecurity requirements appears weak.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across diverse projects and languages
Proven ability to work with high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang, real-time data processing)
Strong focus on software craftsmanship, testing, and agile methodologies
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, particularly for industrial automation and high-performance systems
No clear evidence of work with message brokers, STL, or industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443)
Lack of domain experience in automation machinery manufacturing or IoT

key_factors.factor: C++ experience and industrial automation alignment
